calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GEENA HIDALGO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM.

Plaintiff Geena Hidalgo's motion for leave to amend complaint to add -punitive damages claim is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
